steps.title: Confirm filing county
steps.description: Identify the NYC county where the custody matter will be filed.
steps.relevance: County determines the Family Court location and local practice.

steps.title: Identify children involved
steps.description: Confirm how many children are involved and basic custody context.
steps.relevance: Child information shapes petitions and court procedures.

steps.title: Assess agreement status
steps.description: Determine whether parties agree on custody and visitation.
steps.relevance: Agreement status affects whether the matter is contested.

steps.title: Check for an existing case
steps.description: Determine whether a custody or divorce case has already been started.
steps.relevance: An active case may change which forms and motions apply.

steps.title: Identify required court forms
steps.description: The appropriate forms depend on your situation and court.
steps.relevance: Form requirements are determined by your case facts.
